name: research-rigor
description: A self-contained rigor toolkit for researchers and research engineers. Decide what to build (design-spec), find prior art before building it (prior-art-check), run a defensible literature search (research-papers), harden the decisions to genuine convergence with diverse adversarial critics (convergent-review), and turn the spec into a reviewable implementation plan (implementation-plan), orchestrated end to end by project-kickoff. Ships the oracle and council critic agents. External search providers (Exa, GitHub, OpenAlex, and more) are optional and auto-detected, with graceful fallback to built-in tools.
